default_strike.text:
Only one Week of Nightmares can be played in a game.
Put this card in play with 10 nightmare counters. Ravnos get +1 bleed and +1 strength and do not hunt as normal. Any Ravnos can steal 1 blood from another Ravnos as a +1 stealth hunt action. During each Methuselah's unlock phase, that Methuselah can move 1 nightmare counter from this card to a Ravnos. If this card has no counters, each Ravnos burns 1 blood for each nightmare counter on them or is burned, then burn this card and the nightmare counters.
